title: Payment API trust boundary notes
content: JWT verification occurs in auth-service and fallback checks exist in payment-api middleware. jsonwebtoken upgrade must be coordinated with token validation integration tests.

title: Settlement worker import runbook
content: Archive extraction and batch import logic rely on tar and minimist arguments. Validate extraction jail path and command argument sanitation before release.

title: Websocket incident postmortem summary
content: Prior instability incident linked to websocket frame flood patterns under high event volume. ws upgrades should include load test and frame-throttle validation.
